name: Obsidian Web Clipper
applicability: Chrome extension for web page → markdown ingestion. Could feed our /analyze pipeline.
home_connection: Alternative ingestion path. Our WebFetch does similar but this preserves page layout better.

name: Local Images Plus (Obsidian plugin)
applicability: Preserves images when clipping web pages to markdown. Obsidian-specific.
home_connection: Not directly applicable — we don't use Obsidian as a frontend.

name: Karpathy's Twitter post on Obsidian knowledge bases
applicability: Original source for the raw→wiki→index pattern. More detailed than the video.
home_connection: Primary source for the pattern. Worth analyzing separately via /analyze.

name: Chase AI CLAUDE.md template for knowledge bases
applicability: Specialized CLAUDE.md for wiki traversal and knowledge base rules.
home_connection: Compare against our CLAUDE.md Section 7 for knowledge-specific patterns.
